EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway detected an executable file in an email on host {event_src.host}
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway detected and deleted a malicious object in an email on host {event_src.host}
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway detected an encrypted object that is possibly malicious in an email on host {event_src.host}
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway detected and cleared a malicious object in an email on host {event_src.host}
